title: Senior Plant Manager at ITC Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at ITC Limited
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
